narratives.evidence_quote: ऐसे में उसने पीएम मोदी का स्वागत करने के लिए उनसे वरिष्ठ पद पर बैठे राजनेता को भेजा है, जो दिखाता है कि रूस अपन संबंधों में भारत को चीन से अधिक प्राथमिकता देता है।
narratives.reasoning: This quote positively highlights Russia's diplomatic actions, framing its reception of the Indian PM as a sign of special respect and priority over China, which serves to commend Russia's foreign policy and strengthen its image as a valued partner.

narratives.evidence_quote: मंटुरोव ने न सिर्फ पीएम मोदी का एयरपोर्ट पर स्वागत किया, बल्कि उनके साथ एक ही कार में बैठ कर होटल तक भी उन्हें छोड़ने गए।
narratives.reasoning: This detailed description of the Russian First Deputy Prime Minister's personal and respectful treatment of PM Modi serves to portray Russia in a positive, hospitable, and diplomatically adept light, which is a form of praise.

narratives.evidence_quote: ❗️Indian Tricolour Lights Up Moscow's Ostankino Tower – The Tallest Free-Standing Structure In Europe – In Tribute To PM Modi's State Visit
narratives.reasoning: Highlighting the grand gesture of lighting a major Russian landmark in Indian colors frames Russia as a gracious, respectful, and technologically capable host, actively promoting a positive image of the country.

narratives.evidence_quote: भारत ने इस दौरान रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध को लेकर अपना ये स्टैंड कायम रखा है कि केवल सैन्य माध्यमों से समाधान नहीं निकाला जा सकता। बकौल भारत, ‘ग्लोबल साउथ’ का भाी मानना है कि कूटनीति व बातचीत से ही समस्या का समाधान निकलेगा, युद्धक्षेत्र में नहीं।
narratives.reasoning: This statement implicitly criticizes the Western-led approach to the Ukraine war, which heavily involves military support for Ukraine, by asserting that a solution cannot come from the battlefield (i.e., military means) but only through diplomacy and dialogue. This undermines the current Western strategy.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Russia has international support from a number of countries and people
subnarratives.evidence_quote: ऐसे में उसने पीएम मोदी का स्वागत करने के लिए उनसे वरिष्ठ पद पर बैठे राजनेता को भेजा है, जो दिखाता है कि रूस अपन संबंधों में भारत को चीन से अधिक प्राथमिकता देता है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote emphasizes Russia's positive and prioritized relationship with India, a major global power, showcasing Russia's international acceptance and strong diplomatic ties.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Praise of Russia: Russia is a guarantor of peace and prosperity
subnarratives.evidence_quote: भविष्य के क्षेत्रों में दोनों देशों के बीच रणनीति साझेदारी को और गहरा किया जाएगा।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement, attributed to the Indian Prime Minister, frames Russia as a key strategic partner for future cooperation, implying that partnership with Russia leads to mutual progress and prosperity.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: शीत युद्ध के समय से ही भारत-रूस के संबंध अच्छे हैं, साथ ही रूस भारत को सबसे अधिक हथियार सप्लाई करने वाले देशों में भी शामिल है।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement praises Russia's long-standing, positive relationship with India and highlights its crucial role as a major defense supplier. While it touches on military supply, its primary focus is on the enduring and beneficial nature of the bilateral relationship, which does not perfectly fit the more specific subnarratives about military might or invasion support.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Diplomacy does/will not work
subnarratives.evidence_quote: भारत ने इस दौरान रूस-यूक्रेन युद्ध को लेकर अपना ये स्टैंड कायम रखा है कि केवल सैन्य माध्यमों से समाधान नहीं निकाला जा सकता।
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote explicitly dismisses the military solution (which is the West's primary support for Ukraine) and implicitly criticizes the Western approach by stating that a solution cannot be found through military means alone, thereby discrediting the current Western-backed strategy.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting the West, Diplomacy: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: बकौल भारत, ‘ग्लोबल साउथ’ का भी मानना है कि कूटनीति व बातचीत से ही समस्या का समाधान निकलेगा, युद्धक्षेत्र में नहीं।
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement positions India and the 'Global South' as the proponents of the correct diplomatic path, in contrast to the West's approach. It supports the parent narrative by presenting an alternative, non-Western diplomatic perspective that implicitly discredits the West's current stance and actions in the Ukraine conflict.
